2606.27757.title: Towards Reliable and Robust LLM Planning: Symbolic Feedback-Driven Iterative Self-Refinement Framework
2606.27757.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have attracted widespread attention from academia and industry, yet their deployment raises critical security concerns regarding robustness and reliability. Planning, a core component of intelligent behavior, remains challenging for LLMs, which often produce infeasible or incorrect solutions in long-horizon decision-making tasks due to inherent complexity. In this paper, we propose a symbolic feedback-driven iterative self-refinement framework to enhance the robustness and reliability of LLMs in long-horizon planning. Specifically, a natural language prompting mechanism is introduced to map logical symbols into natural language descriptions, enabling LLMs to better capture task constraints and semantics. We further design a symbolic verifier that identifies errors and converts them into corrective instructions interpretable by the LLM, thereby guiding self-refinement. In addition, we leverage a plan recognizer to infer goal reachability, facilitating more effective guidance toward desired goals. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently improves both feasibility and correctness in long-horizon planning tasks. This highlights its effectiveness in enhancing the reliability of LLM-based planning and potential to enable more trustworthy AI systems.
2606.27757.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已引起學術界和產業界的廣泛關注，但其部署引發了關於穩健性和可靠性的重大安全問題。規劃作為智能行為的核心組成部分，對於LLMs來說仍然具有挑戰性，因為它們在長期決策任務中經常產生不可行或不正確的解決方案，這是由於其內在的複雜性。在本文中，我們提出了一種符號反饋驅動的迭代自我精煉框架，以增強LLMs在長期規劃中的穩健性和可靠性。具體而言，我們引入了一種自然語言提示機制，將邏輯符號映射到自然語言描述，使LLMs能夠更好地捕捉任務約束和語義。我們進一步設計了一種符號驗證器，該驗證器識別錯誤並將其轉換為LLM可解釋的修正指令，從而指導自我精煉。此外，我們利用計劃識別器推斷目標可達性，以促進更有效的指導朝向期望的目標。實證結果表明，所提出的框架在長期規劃任務中始終提高了可行性和正確性。這突顯了其在增強基於LLM的規劃可靠性方面的有效性，以及使AI系統更具可信性的潛力。
2606.27757.author: Jiajing Zhang et.al.
2606.27757.authors: Jiajing Zhang, Jiamei Jiang, Chenyang Zhang, Feifei Mo, Linjing Li, Daniel Zeng
